appDesc.message: Your ultimate productivity dock! FloatBar slides from the edge to launch apps in floating, always-on-top windows.

instructions.message: Just move your mouse toward the right edge of the screen on any site to open it, hit the + button, and add your favorite web apps!

contextMenuInstruction.message: Right Click on any site hover on the FloatBar Apps icon to make the page always on top or add your favorite web apps!

backgroundRunning.message: This window is running in the background.

confirmRemove.message: Are you sure you want to remove this app?

errorEnterNameUrl.message: Please enter both an App Name and a valid URL.

noteGmail.message: Note: Some sites (Gmail etc) may not work properly.

howToUseHelp.message: Move mouse to right edge to open.
